title: trochoseris alpina
intro: Trochoseris alpina, also known as Alpine Tick-trefoil, is a flowering plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Trochoseris alpina include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are often used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is known for its various health benefits, including its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Trochoseris alpina is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a poultice or topical ointment to aid in the healing process.
